Purchased by an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] scavenger decades before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], '''R4-J1''' scoured junkyards for parts after developing a scavenging routine of its own. During this time, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] developed an unusual trait that caused it to jury-rig devices it was supposed to repair.

==Behind the scenes==
R4-J1 was made into an action figure in the new Hasbro Legacy Collection "Build a droid" toy line. On the reverse of these new Star Wars: Legacy figures cards you can find five component parts to build four different Astromech droids, of which R4-J1 is one. The Legacy figures that contain these parts are [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|Clone armor]] (left leg), [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] heavy gunner (right leg), [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|Clone SCUBA trooper]] (head and middle leg), and [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG Lancer Droid]] (main body).
